notes: S3G1-TC001: Admin login with admin@factory.local/admin123. Redirected to Dashboard. All 4 nav items visible (Dashboard, Orders, Workflows, Settings). User shows 'Admin' with 'admin' role.
S3G1-TC002: Supervisor login with jan.novak@factory.local/super123. Dashboard loaded. Shows 'Jan Novak' with 'supervisor' role. 3 nav items (Dashboard, Orders, Workflows). Settings hidden.
S3G1-TC003: Operator login with petra.svoboda@factory.local/oper123. Dashboard loaded. Shows 'Petra Svoboda' with 'operator' role. 3 nav items, no Settings.
S3G1-TC004: Login with nonexistent@factory.local shows 'Login failed' alert. Remains on login page.
S3G1-TC005: Login with admin@factory.local and wrong password shows 'Login failed' alert.
S3G1-TC006: Empty email with filled password triggers 'Email is required' validation alert on submit.
S3G1-TC007: Filled email with empty password triggers 'Password is required' validation alert on submit.
S3G1-TC008: Both fields empty triggers 'Email is required' validation alert on submit.
S3G1-TC009: Admin demo button auto-fills admin@factory.local/admin123. Login succeeds, Dashboard loads with 'Logged in successfully' toast.
S3G1-TC010: Supervisor demo button auto-fills jan.novak@factory.local credentials. Login succeeds, Dashboard loads.
S3G1-TC011: Operator demo button auto-fills petra.svoboda@factory.local credentials. Login succeeds, 'Petra Svoboda' with 'operator' role shown.
S3G1-TC012: After Operator login, localStorage contains 'token' key with value 'VVNSLTAwMw==' (base64-encoded user ID).
S3G1-TC013: Token 'VVNSLTAwMw==' decodes to 'USR-003' via atob(), confirming base64-encoded user ID for Operator.
S3G1-TC014: After page reload, session persists. Dashboard still displayed with 'Petra Svoboda' without redirect to login.
S3G1-TC015: New tab opened to localhost:3333. Session active — 'Petra Svoboda' shown, no login button. Session persists across tabs.
S3G1-TC016: After clicking Logout, localStorage token is null. Session destroyed.
S3G1-TC017: After logout, redirected to login page. Login button visible, no dashboard content.
S3G1-TC018: Removed token from localStorage, navigated to app. Redirected to login page with Login button shown.
S3G1-TC019: Set garbage token 'garbage_invalid_token' in localStorage, navigated to app. Redirected to login page.
S3G1-TC020: Admin login shows Settings link in sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Orders, Workflows, Settings — 4 items).
S3G1-TC021: Supervisor login shows 3 nav items (Dashboard, Orders, Workflows). Settings link count = 0.
S3G1-TC022: Operator login shows 3 nav items (Dashboard, Orders, Workflows). Settings link count = 0.

S3G1-TC023: Operator created order ORD-025 via full 3-step wizard (Steel Bracket A, qty 200, High priority, Assembly Line Alpha, Morning shift). Submitted from detail page — status changed to Submitted. Card found in Submitted column on Workflows. Activity log shows creation and submission by USR-003 (Operator).

S3G1-TC024: Supervisor approved ORD-025 (Submitted->Approved via Kanban card click). Then started production via detail page 'Start Production' button (Approved->In Production by USR-002). Activity log shows all transitions with correct user attribution. Both transitions succeeded.

S3G1-TC025: Admin created order ORD-028 via wizard (Copper Wire Harness, qty 150, Low priority, CNC Machining Center). Walked through all statuses via detail page action buttons: Draft->Submitted->Approved->In Production->Quality Check->Completed. Activity log shows 6 entries (creation + 5 transitions) all by USR-001 (Admin). Each transition showed correct status update. Final status: Completed with no available actions.
